free_text: Measurement and simulation of the cross sections
for nuclide production in Fe-56 and Cr-nat targets
data for Cr-0 and page of 355-381 for Fe-56 targets
LAHET, CEM95, CEM2K, CASCADE, INUCL and YIELDX
HPGe detectors with the energy resolutions of
1.8 and 1.7 keV for the 1332-keV gamma-line of 60Co
No information on source of uncertainties
The samples have the diameter of 10.5-mm.
The samples are made from natural chromium
The samples are made from enriched iron Fe-54 0.3%,
Fe-56 99.5+-0.1, Fe-57 0.2% and less than 0.05 of Fe-58
The total levels of chemical impurities in Cr,Fe and Al
samples were no more than 0.19, 0.00001 and 0.05%,
*By author*.Cumulative cross section is usual sum of
a nuclide independent cross section and cumulative
Production  cross  sections for K-44 are
determination of the cross section see in ISTC#2002.
